title: DFF with constant set or reset non removal
body:
I compiled attached file with yosys 0.9+2406 and yosys 0.9+3521. It seems 3521 does not remove DFFs with constant set or reset inputs. On the other hand, 2406 removes DFFs with constant set or reset input. I have also attached log files and final synthesis results for both version. Same ys script is used. My operating system is Centos 7.
[dffissue.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/5135058/dffissue.zip)
